Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Power Washing to get the job done right.

“After three other companies just bleached our roof white temporarily, Summit actually solved our recurrent black streaks. Two years later, our Arlington home’s roof still looks clean despite Jacksonville’s humidity. They even noticed some loose flashing our roofer missed.”

Marianne K. Roof Cleaning
Mar 14, 2025

“The oil stains from my classic car project had been there so long I thought they were permanent. Summit used some kind of heated treatment that lifted everything without etching the concrete. Now my Riverside historic district driveway looks brand new.”

Carlos R. Driveway Cleaning
Jan 22, 2025

“Our Ponte Vedra beach house deck was gray and splintery after 8 years of salt air. They brought back the original cedar color without sanding and pointed out some soft spots we could fix before they became dangerous. Staining prep was included—unlike other quotes we got.”

Lisa T. Deck Restoration
Nov 5, 2024

“The team understood exactly how to clean our 1960s San Marco brick without damaging the mortar. They adjusted pressure constantly for different surfaces—even got decades of grime off our aluminum awning. House looks like it did when my grandparents bought it.”

James D. Residential Power Washing
Oct 18, 2024

“I didn’t realize how much damage clogged gutters were causing until Summit cleaned ours. They found rotting fascia behind the downspout and showed me exactly where water was pooling near our foundation. Preventative maintenance is worth every penny in Jacksonville.”

Natasha P. Gutter Cleaning
Sep 29, 2024

“Scheduled a pre-hurricane season clean for our Mandarin home. The crew power-washed siding, cleaned gutters, and even removed lichen from our paver walkway—all in one visit. When the storm hit, water actually flowed away from the house like it’s supposed to. Will make this an annual ritual.”

Derrick W. Full Exterior Cleaning
Aug 11, 2024
Summit Power Washing

Trusted power washing professionals serving Jacksonville, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
